name: Trempealeau Mountain Golf Club
about: Trempealeau Mountain Golf Club is a scenic and welcoming destination for golfers of all skill levels. Nestled near the majestic Mississippi river of western Wisconsin, the course features an 18-hole championship layout with beautifully maintained greens that offer both playability and challenge. The property includes a large, well-kept driving range and a clubhouse where players can unwind. The venue operates a golf simulator facility open Thursday through Sunday, offering a complement to its outdoor course, which is closed for the season.
why_golfers_like_it: High-quality golf simulator technology for year-round play
Beautiful and scenic course setting with Mississippi River views
Comprehensive amenities including clubhouse with bar and driving range
Hosts leagues, events, and brand-specific club fitting sessions
Variety of membership options available for individuals and families

food_and_drink.notes: Clubhouse has a full bar with cold drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium technology based on fitting events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, but the facility likely has rentals available for those without.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: 18 holes on the simulator typically takes between 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Trempealeau Mountain Golf Club offers junior memberships and programs, making it suitable for families.
